perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with dark hair, wearing a grey suit and a pink turtleneck, is posing for cameras in front of a white wall featuring logos. (2) The scene transitions to the man on a red carpet area, where he interacts with a host and then walks through a crowd of fans holding smartphones. (3) He walks onto a stage with a red carpet, shakes hands with another man in a grey suit, and receives a small award box. (4) He stands at a podium with a GQ microphone, delivering a speech while smiling and gesturing. (5) He finishes the speech, bows deeply, and is seen walking through a crowded area with fans as the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop music plays as the primary background. Sounds of rapid camera shutters and excited crowd chatter/cheering are audible. (2) A male voice introduces the main character in Mandarin Chinese with an enthusiastic tone. (3) The main character speaks, alternating between Korean and brief Mandarin Chinese phrases. His tone is polite, happy, and grateful. (4) Frequent bursts of loud cheering and screaming from a crowd occur throughout the speech and his transitions across scenes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom center, translating the speaker's Korean dialogue into Mandarin. (2) Decorative Text: 'GQ MEN OF THE YEAR' is prominently displayed on the backdrop in large black and silver lettering. (3) Functional Text: Brand names 'Bowers & Wilkins' and 'Regent' appear as sponsor logos on the lower part of the backdrop.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Posing for photos -> Walking through fans -> Receiving award -> Acceptance speech.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male celebrity (Lee Teuk), 1 male host on stage, at least 20 fans and staff visible in the crowd and background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian male with styled dark hair, wearing a tailored grey suit jacket and trousers over a bright pink turtleneck sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a white branded photo wall, a red 'GQ' themed backdrop, and an outdoor stage area at night near a brick building with colonial-style architecture.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright artificial stage lighting and frequent camera flashes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Arrival -> Fan Interaction -> Award Ceremony -> Speech
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and celebrate Lee Teuk's participation in and recognition at the GQ Men of the Year event in Taipei, showcasing his popularity and professional achievement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is centered around a brand-sponsored event (GQ) with visible logos for Bowers & Wilkins and Regent.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-profile K-pop idol appearance behavior, including polite bowing and specific stage mannerisms.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video highlights the cross-cultural appeal of South Korean celebrities at international fashion media events in Taiwan.
